claim: No Stable, release, conformance, manual assistive-technology, package-parity, or publication claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.rolePolicy: No figure, image, group, or presentation semantics are inferred from geometry.
semantics.contentPolicy: Child semantics and accessible names remain unchanged.

layout.nativeFirst: Uses the CSS aspect-ratio property with a positive numeric value.
layout.fallback: A percentage block-start padding fallback is isolated under @supports not (aspect-ratio: 1).
layout.overflow: No overflow clipping is applied; semantic content may expand the preferred ratio.
layout.mediaFit: contain and cover size only direct native media-like children; none removes the fitting selector and surface signal.

consumerResponsibilities: Provide alt text, captions, iframe titles, controls, and other semantics required by the child content.
Add an explicit local crop treatment only when losing visual edges does not remove information.
Verify third-party embedded content independently at narrow sizes and zoom.
